name: 1-2-3-4 Cake by James Beard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x1/2 inch deep baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the sifted cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In another large bowl, cream the softened butter until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually add the sugar to the butter, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in the eggs one at a time, making sure each is fully incorporated before adding the next.
7. Stir in the milk and vanilla extract.
8. Fold in the dry ingredients until just combined.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
12. Turn off the oven when you are finished baking.
